name: hypr-agent-protal
description: hypr-agent-protal MCP only. Hyprland background screenshot, input, clipboard, browser/Chromium control, app-state, and visible agent cursor bridge. Do not use Browser MCP when the user explicitly asks for hypr-agent-protal. Do not use the obsolete hyprcum server.

interface.defaultPrompt: Use only the hypr-agent-protal MCP server/namespace; do not use Browser MCP when the user explicitly asks for hypr-agent-protal, and do not use obsolete hyprcum. If the user asks to open/launch a new app/window, call launch_app/open_app first even if an existing app is running. For Chromium/Chrome browser tasks use launch_app with app=chromium, url, and new_window=true. Then call get_app_state or screenshot with app. Prefer element_index or screenshot/window-relative coordinates. Use global target/x/y only as a low-level computer fallback. Shortcut inputs may be key, keys, modifiers, or keycode. Do not use app-specific heuristics; refresh app state and act on visible current elements.
